top_articles.reason: Engine fire incident poses safety concerns and impacts airport operations.
top_articles.title: Delta A330 Engine Fire Spews Debris Over São Paulo Airport After Takeoff
top_articles.summary_en: A Delta Air Lines Airbus A330-300 operating flight DL104 from São Paulo to Atlanta had to return shortly after takeoff due to an engine fire, causing debris to fall and ignite a brush fire at the airport. The incident led to temporary flight disruptions at São Paulo/Guarulhos Airport, with several flights canceled or delayed as operations were halted for safety.
top_articles.summary_zh: 一架执行从圣保罗飞往亚特兰大的达美航空空客A330-300航班DL104在起飞后不久因发动机起火而返回，导致碎片落下并点燃了机场的草火。该事件导致圣保罗/瓜鲁柳斯机场的航班暂时中断，多个航班被取消或延误，因安全原因暂停了运营。

top_articles.reason: Suspension of travel perks for Congress highlights political and operational tensions.
top_articles.title: Delta VIP Travel Perks Suspended For Members Of Congress Amid Budget Dispute
top_articles.summary_en: Delta Air Lines has suspended VIP travel perks for members of Congress due to ongoing budget disputes that have resulted in a partial government shutdown. This shutdown has led to significant delays at U.S. airports as security workers are forced to work without pay.
top_articles.summary_zh: 由于预算争议导致部分政府停摆，达美航空暂停了国会议员的VIP旅行特权。这次停摆导致美国机场的安检工作人员被迫无薪工作，从而造成了严重的延误。

top_articles.reason: Record TSA officer departures lead to significant travel disruptions.
top_articles.title: Chaos Continues: TSA Callouts Reach Record Numbers As Over 500 Officers Quit
top_articles.summary_en: The TSA is experiencing significant disruptions at airport security checkpoints due to the recent departure of over 500 screening officers, leading to extended wait times for travelers. As air travel demand rebounds to pre-pandemic levels, the agency struggles to hire and train new staff, exacerbating staffing shortages and operational inefficiencies.
top_articles.summary_zh: 由于最近超过500名安检人员的离职，TSA在机场安检通道面临重大干扰，导致旅客等待时间延长。随着航空旅行需求恢复到疫情前水平，该机构在招聘和培训新员工方面面临困难，加剧了人手短缺和运营效率低下的问题。

top_articles.reason: Innovative testing for new aircraft reflects advancements in aviation safety.
top_articles.title: 180 Liters Of Water: The Unusual Test Powering The New Airbus A350F
top_articles.summary_en: Airbus has begun ground testing for its new A350F freighter, focusing on complex systems like the drainage system, which involves flooding the aircraft with 180 liters of water to ensure proper evacuation. The testing program also includes assessments of the cargo loading system and other critical features, highlighting the challenges of certifying a new aircraft variant.
top_articles.summary_zh: 空客已开始对其新型A350F货机进行地面测试，重点关注复杂系统，如排水系统，该系统涉及用180升水淹没飞机以确保正确排水。测试程序还包括对货物装载系统和其他关键特性的评估，突显了认证新型飞机变体的挑战。

top_articles.reason: Alaska Airlines' expansion into Europe marks a significant milestone for the airline.

shownotes_en:
Welcome back to the Aviation News Podcast! I’m your host, Dudu, and today is March 30, 2026. We’ve got some important stories to cover that are shaping the aviation world, so let’s dive right in.

First up, we have a dramatic incident involving Delta Air Lines. A Delta Airbus A330-300, operating flight DL104 from São Paulo to Atlanta, had to return shortly after takeoff due to an engine fire. This alarming situation not only forced the aircraft to come back but also led to debris falling over São Paulo/Guarulhos Airport, igniting a brush fire on the ground. Thankfully, the crew managed to handle the situation effectively, but it caused considerable disruption, with several flights canceled or delayed as safety protocols were enacted. It’s a stark reminder of the risks involved in aviation, even in routine flights.

Speaking of Delta, the airline is in the news again for a different reason. Due to ongoing budget disputes that have resulted in a partial government shutdown, Delta has suspended VIP travel perks for members of Congress. This decision comes at a time when delays are already impacting U.S. airports, as security workers are forced to work without pay amid the shutdown. It’s a complex situation that highlights the intersection of aviation and government policy, and it’s affecting travelers across the nation.

And if you thought that was chaotic, the TSA is also facing its own set of challenges. They’ve reported record numbers of callouts, with over 500 screening officers quitting recently. This has led to significant disruptions at airport security checkpoints, resulting in longer wait times for travelers. As air travel demand rebounds to pre-pandemic levels, the TSA is struggling to hire and train new staff, which only adds to the operational inefficiencies. It’s a tough time for travelers who are eager to get back in the skies.

Now, let’s shift gears a bit and talk about some exciting developments in aircraft technology. Airbus has begun ground testing for its new A350F freighter, and one of the more unusual aspects of this testing involves flooding the aircraft with 180 liters of water. This test is crucial for ensuring that the drainage system functions properly during emergencies. They’re also assessing the cargo loading system and other critical features, which highlights the challenges of certifying a new aircraft variant. It’s fascinating to see how manufacturers are pushing the envelope to ensure safety and efficiency.

As we wrap up today’s episode, it’s clear that the aviation industry is navigating through both challenges and innovations. Whether it’s dealing with incidents like the Delta engine fire or advancing technology with the A350F, there’s always something happening in the skies. Thanks for tuning in to the Aviation News Podcast. Until next time, safe travels and happy flying!
shownotes_zh:
欢迎回到航空新闻播客！我是您的主持人Dudu，今天是2026年3月30日。我们有一些重要的故事要讨论，这些故事正在塑造航空界，所以让我们直接进入主题。

首先，我们来看看涉及达美航空的戏剧性事件。一架达美航空的空客A330-300，执行航班DL104，从圣保罗飞往亚特兰大，在起飞后不久因发动机着火而不得不返回。这一令人不安的情况不仅迫使飞机返回，还导致碎片落在圣保罗/瓜鲁柳斯机场，引发了地面上的草地火灾。幸运的是，机组人员有效地处理了这一情况，但这造成了相当大的干扰，多个航班被取消或延误，因为安全协议被执行。这提醒我们，即使在例行航班中，航空旅行也存在风险。

说到达美航空，这家航空公司因另一个原因再次登上新闻。由于持续的预算争议导致部分政府关闭，达美已暂停国会议员的VIP旅行福利。此决定正值美国机场已经受到影响的时期，安全工作人员在关闭期间被迫无薪工作。这是一个复杂的情况，突显了航空与政府政策之间的交集，并影响着全国的旅客。

如果你认为情况已经混乱，TSA也面临着自己的挑战。他们报告了创纪录的缺勤人数，最近有超过500名安检人员辞职。这导致机场安检通道出现重大干扰，旅客的等待时间延长。随着航空旅行需求恢复到疫情前的水平，TSA在招聘和培训新员工方面苦苦挣扎，这只会加剧运营效率低下的情况。对于渴望再次飞行的旅客来说，这是一个艰难的时刻。

现在，让我们稍微转变一下话题，谈谈飞机技术的一些令人兴奋的发展。空客已开始对其新型A350F货机进行地面测试，其中一个比较不寻常的测试涉及向飞机灌入180升水。这个测试对于确保排水系统在紧急情况下正常工作至关重要。他们还在评估货物装载系统和其他关键功能，这突显了认证新型飞机变体所面临的挑战。看到制造商在确保安全和效率方面不断推陈出新，真是令人着迷。

在今天的节目结束时，很明显，航空行业正在应对挑战和创新。无论是处理达美航空的发动机火灾事件，还是通过A350F推进技术发展，天空中总是发生着一些事情。感谢您收听航空新闻播客。下次见，祝您安全旅行，飞行愉快！
